posts.text:
Six years ago, when regime in Iran hanged wrestler Navid Afkari, I launched the United for Navid campaign alongside 50 athletes and activists. We warned the world. No action.
Now it’s happening again.
More protesters. More athletes. On death row.

This time, please don’t look away.
Join us to stop the executions and end the root cause of the endless war in the region: the Islamic Republic.

Thanks CBS for letting me say their names on air.

These five people are not numbers. Not statistics.
They

Today, in Iran, in the middle of a war, the regime executed a 19-year-old national wrestling champion for the crime of joining January protests. 💔

After signaling to the world, including President @realDonaldTrump, that they would halt executions of protesters, the regime has done the exact opposite.

Three young protesters, Saleh Mohammadi, Mehdi Ghasemi, and Saeed Davoudi, were hanged in Qom after a sham trial.

Reports indicate torture. Forced confessions. No access to chosen lawyers. Closed

Nowruz arrives, but Iran is still bleeding. Homes meant for laughter and joy in new year. In my beloved homeland Iran, homes are filled with silence and sorrow. Children are learning fear instead of joy.

But we do not lose hope. Because Nowruz is not just the arrival of spring. It is a reminder that no winter lasts forever. And I truly believe we will overcome this winter.

Spring is coming, a spring of freedom, of joy, of reclaiming our culture in homes that deserve to be filled with laughter.

Those broken ears? Years of dreams… sitting in a sham trial, waiting to be hanged.

They hanged him without giving him the chance to say goodbye to his family.

Hate the cruelty enough.
Love these innocent lives enough to speak up. 💔
#Iran

Video
  




Masih Alinejad 🏳️ (@AlinejadMasih)

Today, in Iran, in the middle of a war, the regime executed a 19-year-old national wrestling champion for the crime of joining January protests. 💔

Mr. Mandani I appreciate that you’re learning about Iranian’s culture, but I wish to inform you that today, Saleh Mohammadi, a teenager, only 19, a wrestler, full of hopes and dreams was executed in Iran for protesting.  Just a day before our new year, our Nowruz. The Islamic regime hanged them on purpose to break everyone’s heart. Look at his face and look at the faces of all these five protesters who were executed today by hanging in Iran. We Iranians are mourning. 

We the people of Iran want

Thank you, Senator @SenFettermanPA for your support, this is what you exactly said before this is the exam in republic targeting unarmed civilians.

Thanks for understands that removing a terrorist like Khamenei is not a tragedy, it is a sign of justice for the victims.

You get it. When a regime is shooting civilians, executing teenagers, democratic countries must take action. 
While Democrats are busy debating and criticizing the removal of our murderous regime in Iran this regime is busy hang

Mr. President @realDonaldTrump,
Mojtaba Khamenei’s regime executed 19 years old. champion wrestler, Saleh Mohammadi and 2 other protesters in Iran for protesting.
You said they promised you to stop hanging protesters. They broke their promise. 

Remove mew Khamenei. Otherwise, he will remove hundreds of innocent protesters who are in prison, waiting to be executed by hanging in Iran.

They have killed more than 32,000 in massacres. blinded 10,000 people, put 40,000 protesters in jail.

They are

Thank you, Congresswoman Maria Salazar. Your voice matters.

Now I’m calling on every representative: please Stand on the right side of history. Hundreds of protesters are a risk of being executed by hanging in Iran.

The Islamic Republic does not represent Iran.
Help us end it.

@RepMariaSalazar


Rep. María Elvira Salazar (@RepMariaSalazar)

A 19-year-old national wrestling champion executed in Iran. Not for a crime, but for speaking out.

For decades, the Iranian regime has waged a relentless

Hello @danawhite, We Iranians remember when you tried to save Iranian wrestler Navid Afkari. You even reached out to President @realDonaldTrump to stop his execution. Back then, I launched a campaign to boycott the this murderous regime, Millions of Iranians were crying out for help to remove this regime. But no one truly listened.

And now… it’s happening again. Today, another young wrestler, just 19, has been executed.
Three protesters were hanged today and hundreds are on death row right now.

Bobby Green, just watched your this, the way your voice broke when you spoke about the execution of Iranian wrestler Navid Afkari, it broke me. You were right. It’s heartbreaking.
Today Saleh Mohamadi, 19-year old wrestler executed for protesting.
We need your voice again. 💔

Video
  




Masih Alinejad 🏳️ (@AlinejadMasih)

Today, in Iran, in the middle of a war, the regime executed a 19-year-old national wrestling champion for the crime of joining January protests. 💔

After signaling to the wor

This should have been on the front page of The New York Times.
I speak to students in America and most have no idea that more than 30,000 Iranians were killed for protesting and demanding freedom.
No names. No faces. No coverage. This silence kills me.💔

Thank you, Australia.

His name is Saleh Mohammadi, 19 years old wrestler. He was hanged today in Iran for the crime of protesting in last January and demanding💔
